name: Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add bacon, garlic, and onion; sauté for about 5 minutes.
2. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and set aside. Add ground beef, salami, basil, and parsley to the pan. Cook until browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in tomato paste and mushrooms. Pour in water and tomatoes, then return the garlic to the sauce. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Simmer uncovered for 1 hour or until very thick, stirring occasionally.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Butter a 12x9 inch casserole dish or lasagna pan.
7. Grate the mozzarella cheese and mix it with cottage cheese, eggs, and Parmesan in a shallow bowl.
8. In the casserole dish, spread a layer of tomato sauce. Layer with noodles, then the cheese/egg mixture, and sprinkle with mozzarella.
9. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used, finishing with sauce and mozzarella on top.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until heated through and bubbly. Let stand for a few minutes before serving.
Note: The flavor improves when lasagna is prepared a day in advance and refrigerated until time for baking.
